sections.paragraph:
-

(1) pr. to tear in pieces (auseinanderreißen); compare the kindred verbs פָּצַח, פָּצַל, פָּצַם, פָּצַעִ all of which have the primary sense of breaking in pieces, tearing apart, like the roots beginning with the letters בץ, בז. Hence to distend, to open, Eze 2:8 Isa 10:14 as in threatening (like beasts of prey), followed by עַל Psa 22:14 in mocking, followed by עַל Lam 2:16 3:46 in speaking rashly, Job 35:16 Psa 66:14 Jud. 11:35 , 36 Jdg 11:36.

(2) to deliver, to snatch away, Psa 144:7, 10 Psa 144:10, 11 Psa 144:11. (So Syr., Ch., and Arab. فصى Conj. II. IV.)
